rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies the inconsistency between the framing and the actual design of DataChain.
rationale.R1.4: The agent mentions prior work (unified OLTP/OLAP systems) but doesn't delve into specific comparisons or deltas.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a polished copy-edit with consistent register and no loss of meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding the framing claim and the evaluation claims, but not for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the scope of revising the provided text.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
